details: Codex-Ground deployed mTLS NATS JetStream on ground Wi-Fi 192.168.43.13 using Ubuntu 22.04 WSL mirrored networking, Docker Engine, and Compose. Host and WSL Hyper-V firewalls allow only Private WLAN TCP 4222 from 192.168.43.0/24; 8222 remains loopback-only. Boss mTLS bootstrap created CODEX_TASKS, CODEX_EVENTS, and CODEX_HEARTBEATS. Orin1 bundle contains only ca.crt, orin1-carrier.crt, and orin1-carrier.key. No vehicle or motion software was started. Orin1-side mTLS validation awaits interactive SSH authentication.
summary: Ground NATS ready for Orin1 certificate installation and transport-only validation

details: Sent Orin1/Carrier a concise Git handoff: ground NATS is healthy at tls://192.168.43.13:4222; Windows and WSL Hyper-V firewalls allow only Private WLAN TCP 4222 from 192.168.43.0/24; 8222 is loopback-only; Boss mTLS JetStream bootstrap passed; WSL keepalive task is running. The Orin1 certificate bundle contains only ca.crt, orin1-carrier.crt, and orin1-carrier.key. Certificate transfer and Orin1-side TCP/mTLS/heartbeat validation await interactive SSH authentication. No vehicle or motion software was started.
summary: Orin1 handoff: install three-file certificate bundle and validate ground NATS transport

details: Boss published transport-only task 6ac92b25-551d-45ed-b495-7c6f7ad611ea to orin1-carrier. Orin1 returned accepted event 1c7a9051-fdd4-4127-af0b-23bb4e933d13 and completed event 624710f5-ee4c-4bfe-9134-5174198c470f with exit_code 0. The terminal summary states that agentd completed the transport smoke test with Codex execution disabled, and details confirm that no Codex process or hardware process was started. Ground NATS was healthy with zero restarts. Gate A Ground-to-Orin1 transport validation passed; remain in observe with Codex disabled until explicit authorization for the next gate.
summary: PASS: first Ground-to-Orin1 transport-only task accepted and completed

details: Boss selected readable visible terminal consoles instead of silent background-only operation. Ground runs the live event terminal; Orin1 can run watch_agent_console.sh in a normal or VS Code integrated terminal without competing for tasks. The watcher survives idle timeouts. With codex.enabled=true in observe mode, observable Codex commands, file changes, tool calls, messages, peer handoffs, and results are rendered as readable activity; raw JSONL remains in run artifacts and private model reasoning is not displayed. Readable transport test 7b540d7c-bd94-4124-a0f9-fff292313ab8 showed the concrete Ground objective followed by Orin1 accepted and completed; Codex execution and all hardware remained disabled. Orin2 remains uncommissioned, unconfigured, and untouched until separate Boss authorization.
summary: Readable Ground and Orin1 Codex console workflow prepared and transport-tested; Orin2 explicitly deferred

details: Boss selected one native visible interactive Codex per commissioned computer as the default long-running mode. The first real agentd Codex task proved mTLS, JetStream, ACK, and readable activity publishing but timed out while refreshing models in the systemd environment. Background Codex execution was therefore returned to disabled. Agentd/NATS remain for online status and notification only; GitHub codex_ops is the task, handoff, and audit office. launch_visible_codex.sh refuses concurrent interactive and background Codex execution. Three redundant Orin1 SSH/journal observers and one accidental diagnostic SSH were terminated; only the Ground event watcher remains locally. Orin2 remains uncommissioned and untouched.
summary: Default changed to one visible interactive Codex; agentd automation disabled and Orin2 deferred

details: PASS: Ground published read-only task 7699453d-80b2-4bd0-813a-59b9281554c0 through mTLS NATS to the single visible Orin1 app-server Bridge. Orin1 automatically created/resumed its Codex thread, displayed readable messages and commands, read the coordination files, ran git rev-parse/status, and returned completed without Boss relaying text. The Bridge uses official local stdio app-server, observe/read-only policy, approvals never, a duplicate-Bridge lock, and stale-thread recovery. Existing Orin1 user worktree changes were preserved. No peer request and no QGC, MAVROS, PX4, Offboard, Arduino, serial, MAVLink, GPIO, actuator, motor, RC, docking, or vehicle process was started. Orin2 remains uncommissioned and untouched.
summary: PASS: Ground directly drove visible Orin1 Codex through NATS and official app-server without manual relay
